cherry head red-footed tortoise.enclosure_size: juvenile: 36x18x16 in; indoor adult: 36x72x16 in; outdoor: 48x72x24 in
cherry head red-footed tortoise.diet: 70% dark leafy greens and hay; 20% animal protein (weekly); up to 10% fruit
cherry head red-footed tortoise.substrate: moisture-retaining layer: coconut husk, cypress mulch, or untreated soil
cherry head red-footed tortoise.other_care: Lifespan 50–80 years; one large soaking dish cleaned daily

bearded dragon.diet: Juveniles 60–80% protein (feed 2x/day); 6–12 months 50–60% protein (1x/day); adults 20–30% protein (2–3x/week)
bearded dragon.substrate: 4–6 inches deep mix (50% play sand, 30% organic topsoil, 20% excavator clay)
bearded dragon.other_care: Lifespan 10–15 years; strictly one dragon per enclosure

indian star tortoise.enclosure_size: minimum 90x30 cm (3x1 ft) for small juveniles; solid sides >=30 cm high
indian star tortoise.substrate: newspaper, Astroturf, or natural soil (avoid wood chips)
indian star tortoise.other_care: Two shallow warm water baths per week

pink-bellied side-necked turtle.uvb_note: species-specific UVB not listed; provide appropriate full-spectrum lighting for aquatic chelonians
pink-bellied side-necked turtle.diet: Omnivorous: algae, sponges, crustaceans, mollusks, insects, fish
pink-bellied side-necked turtle.substrate: aquatic setup; females require sandy nesting area for egg deposition

red-footed tortoise.uvb_note: Use 5.0–12% bulbs targeting ~2.0–3.0 UVI; 13h summer / 11h winter
red-footed tortoise.enclosure_size: minimum 96x48x24 inches; adult size ≈ 8x length, 4x width, 2x height
red-footed tortoise.substrate: 4 in deep indoors, 12 in deep outdoors; top with ~1 in leaf litter
red-footed tortoise.other_care: Lifespan 50+ years; one shallow soaking dish required

sulcata tortoise.uvb_note: Use 10.0–14% bulbs to achieve ~4.0–6.0 UVI; seasonal hours
sulcata tortoise.enclosure_size: juveniles <10 in: 96x48x30 in; adult size ≈ 10x length, 5x width, 3x height
sulcata tortoise.diet: Herbivorous: grasses, weeds, leaves; strictly 0% fruit
sulcata tortoise.substrate: 6 in deep for juveniles; 24 in deep for adults (60% topsoil, 40% sand/coconut fiber)
sulcata tortoise.other_care: Lifespan 70+ years; 20–30 minute daily soaks for hatchlings

pac-man frog.diet: Carnivorous: juveniles feed daily; adults 1–2x weekly
pac-man frog.substrate: deep substrate of commercial mulch, bark chips, sphagnum moss, or sterile potting soil
pac-man frog.other_care: Lifespan 5–7 years; under-tank heater commonly used

sun conure.enclosure_size: 30x30x36 in; 0.5 in max bar spacing; multiple perches (>=9 in long, 0.5 in diameter)
sun conure.diet: 60–70% specialized pellets; <10% treats; avoid avocado, caffeine, chocolate, alcohol
